title: Two wins keep Badgers' hopes alive
description: CRICKET NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers are back in contention for a place in the Cricket South Africa Division 2 Twenty/20 knock-out competition.

Yaseen Valli and his wounded team bounced back with one of their most impressive performances in a while when they defeated the unbeaten ACDC Tuskers by six wickets at the Recreation Ground in Oudtshoorn on Wednesday 2 October.

On Saturday 5 October at Buffalo Park in East London, the Badgers produced a clinical performance with an eight-wicket bonus point victory against the Eastern Cape Iianyathi.


> The Badgers were set to host the Northern Cape Heat at the Recreation Ground in Oudtshoorn yesterday, Wednesday 9 October, for a must-win fixture to advance to the semi-finals.


The results of this match were not available at the time of going to print.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
